parameters.functionCode:
/*
 * GOOGLE SHEETS PAYLOAD TRANSFORMER
 * ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 * Flattens nested canonical schema into a flat row object
 * suitable for upsert (matched on email column).
 */

const d = $input.first().json;
const c = d.contact;

return [{
  json: {
    ...d,
    sheetsRow: {
      syncId:            d.syncId,
      traceId:           d.traceId,
      eventType:         d.eventType,
      sourceSystem:      d.sourceSystem,
      email:             c.email,
      firstName:         c.firstName       ?? '',
      lastName:          c.lastName        ?? '',
      phone:             c.phone           ?? '',
      company:           c.company         ?? '',
      jobTitle:          c.jobTitle        ?? '',
      lifecycleStage:    c.lifecycleStage  ?? '',
      leadStatus:        c.leadStatus      ?? '',
      country:           c.country         ?? '',
      city:              c.city            ?? '',
      hubspotId:         d.hubspotContactId ?? '',
      hubspotStatus:     d.destinations.hubspot,
      dealName:          d.deal?.dealName  ?? '',
      dealAmount:        d.deal?.amount    ?? '',
      dealStage:         d.deal?.stage     ?? '',
      receivedAt:        d.receivedAt,
      lastSyncedAt:      new Date().toISOString(),
      hasErrors:         d.errors.length > 0,
      errorSummary:      d.errors.length > 0 ? JSON.stringify(d.errors) : ''
    }
  }
}];
